description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed neckline, vented hem and graphic on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Have you ever felt totally out of touch with the world because of all the time you spend trying to figure out the gadgets that were supposed to keep you connected? Well, voice your frustration with this black tee from tantra. The subliminal graphic of the gadgets and the words "So many gizmos, so little time" is the perfect way to clear out the pent up mood in you. Team this cotton t-shirt with cargos or jeans and fashionable lifestyle shoes or sandals from the wide range available at myntra for that unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
